goal: Create a commit-pinned external CUDA operator packet for the real-adapter training and no-fake endpoint evidence path without committing model, adapter, Docker, or endpoint evidence artifacts.
head: d6ecc02
blocked_scope: Changing verifier acceptance policy or weakening release gates
Editing M6 review docs to GO
Creating or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied external evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add a commit-pinned external CUDA operator packet generator, focused tests, generated packet JSON/Markdown, LLM context/working state, completion log, and PABCD only.
required_evidence: External CUDA operator packet is pinned to the current git commit and primary handoff script.
Packet lists required committed handoff files with sha256 and explicitly forbids committed model/adapters/Docker images/endpoint transcripts/evidence bundles.
Focused tests verify packet structure, required files, no GO claim, and forbidden artifact policy.
Generated packet does not claim M6-RC or v0 release GO.
warnings: The current host still lacks real trained adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence.
This gate creates an operator packet only; it does not run CUDA training, accept evidence, or relax readiness.

phase_notes.plan: Add a commit-pinned external CUDA operator packet that points to the hardened training handoff and downstream no-fake endpoint/evidence return path.
phase_notes.audit: Current docs identify the primary handoff, but there is no generated packet anchoring commit, file hashes, command order, expected return artifacts, and forbidden committed artifacts.
phase_notes.build: Create packet generator, focused tests, generated JSON/Markdown packet, docs/CONTEXT.md, docs/WORKING.md, completion log, and PABCD.
phase_notes.check: Run focused tests, py_compile, packet generation, JSON validation, search evidence, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this operator packet phase.

pabcd.approved_scope: External CUDA operator packet generator, focused tests, generated packet JSON/Markdown, LLM context/working state, completion log, and PABCD only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product behavior changes, no verifier acceptance weakening, no M6 GO doc edits, no adapter/model/Docker evidence commits, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
